text: shir hashirim asher lishelomo
yishaqeni mineshiqovt pihu ki-tovvim dodeykha miyayin
lereycha shemaneykha tovvim shemen turaq shemekha 'al-ken 'alamovt ahevukha
mashekheni achareykha narutsa heviani hamelekh chadarayv nagila venisemecha bakh nazekira dodeykha miyayin meysharim ahevukha s
shechovra ani venava benovt yerushalaim keaholey qedar kiri'ovt shelomo
al-tireuni sheani shecharechoret sheshezafateni hashamesh beney imi nicharu-vi samuni notera et-hakeramim karemi sheli lo natareti
hagida li sheahava nafeshi eykha tire'e eykha tarebits batsahorayim shalama eheye ke'oteya 'al 'ederey chavereykha
im-lo tede'i lakh hayafa banashim tsei-lakh be'iqevey hatson ure'i et-gediyotayikh 'al mishekenovt haro'im s
lesusati berikhevey fare'o dimitikh ra'eyati
navu lechayayikh batorim tsavarekh bacharuzim
tovrey zahav na'aseh-lakh 'im nequdovt hakasef
'ad-shehamelekh bimesibov niredi natan reychov
tserovr hamor ׀ dovdi li beyn shaday yalin
eshekol hakofer ׀ dovdi li bekharemey 'eyn gedi s
hinakh yafa ra'eyati hinakh yafa 'eynayikh yovnim
hinekha yafe dovdi af na'im af-'aresenu ra'anana
qorovt bateynu arazim rachitenu kh rahitenu q berovtim
ani chavatselet hasharovn shovshanat ha'amaqim
keshovshana beyn hachovchim ken ra'eyati beyn habanovt
ketapucha ba'atsey haya'ar ken dovdi beyn habanim betsilov chimadeti veyashaveti ufireyov matovq lechiki
heviani el-beyt hayayin vedigelov 'alay ahava
samekhuni baashishovt rapeduni batapuchim ki-chovlat ahava ani
semolov tachat leroshi viminov techabeqeni
hisheba'eti etekhem benovt yerushalaim bitsevaovt ov beayelovt hasade im-ta'iru ׀ veim-te'ovreru et-haahava 'ad shetechepats s
qovl dovdi hineh-ze ba medaleg 'al-heharim meqapets 'al-hageva'ovt
dovme dovdi litsevi ov le'ofer haayalim hineh-ze 'ovmed achar katelenu mashegicha min-hachalonovt metsits min-hacharakim
'ana dovdi veamar li qumi lakh ra'eyati yafati ulekhi-lakh
ki-hine hasetav kh hasetayv q 'avar hageshem chalaf halakh lov
hanitsanim nireu vaarets 'et hazamir higi'a veqovl hatovr nishema' bearetsenu
hateena chaneta fageyha vehagefanim ׀ semadar natenu reycha qumi lekhi kh lakh q ra'eyati yafati ulekhi-lakh s
yovnati bechagevey hasela' beseter hamaderega hareini et-mareayikh hashemi'ini et-qovlekh ki-qovlekh 'arev umareeykh nave s
echezu-lanu shu'alim shu'alim qetanim mechabelim keramim ukherameynu semadar
dovdi li vaani lov haro'e bashovshanim
'ad sheyafucha hayovm venasu hatselalim sov demeh-lekha dovdi litsevi ov le'ofer haayalim 'al-harey vater s
'al-mishekavi baleylovt biqasheti et sheahava nafeshi biqashetiv velo metsativ
aquma na vaasovveva va'ir bashevaqim uvarechovovt avaqesha et sheahava nafeshi biqashetiv velo metsativ
metsauni hashomerim hasovevim ba'ir et sheahava nafeshi reitem
kime'at she'avareti mehem 'ad shematsati et sheahava nafeshi achazetiv velo arepenu 'ad-shehaveytiv el-beyt imi veel-cheder hovrati
hisheba'eti etekhem benovt yerushalaim bitsevaovt ov beayelovt hasade im-ta'iru ׀ veim-te'ovreru et-haahava 'ad shetechepats s
mi zot 'ola min-hamidebar ketimarovt 'ashan mequteret movr ulevovna mikol aveqat rovkhel
hine mitatov shelishelomo shishim giborim saviv lah migiborey yiserael
kulam achuzey cherev melumedey milechama ish charebov 'al-yerekhov mipachad baleylovt s
apireyovn 'asa lov hamelekh shelomo me'atsey halevanovn
'amudayv 'asa khesef refidatov zahav merekavov aregaman tovkhov ratsuf ahava mibenovt yerushalaim
tseeyna ׀ ureeyna benovt tsiyovn bamelekh shelomo ba'atara she'iterah-lov imov beyovm chatunatov uveyovm simechat libov s
hinakh yafa ra'eyati hinakh yafa 'eynayikh yovnim miba'ad letsamatekh sa'erekh ke'eder ha'izim shegaleshu mehar gile'ad
shinayikh ke'eder haqetsuvovt she'alu min-harachetsa shekulam mateimovt veshakula eyn bahem
kechut hashani sifetotayikh umidebareykh nave kefelach harimovn raqatekh miba'ad letsamatekh
kemigedal david tsavarekh banuy letalepiyovt elef hamagen taluy 'alayv kol shiletey hagibovrim
sheney shadayikh kisheney 'ofarim teovmey tseviya harov'im bashovshanim
'ad sheyafucha hayovm venasu hatselalim elekh li el-har hamovr veel-give'at halevovna
kulakh yafa ra'eyati umum eyn bakh s
iti milevanovn kala iti milevanovn tavovi tashuri ׀ merosh amana merosh senir vecheremovn mime'onovt arayovt meharerey nemerim
libavetini achoti khala libavetini beachad kh beachat q me'eynayikh beachad 'anaq mitsaveronayikh
mah-yafu dodayikh achoti khala mah-tovu dodayikh miyayin vereycha shemanayikh mikal-besamim
nofet titofena sifetovtayikh kala devash vechalav tachat leshovnekh vereycha salemotayikh kereycha levanovn s
gan ׀ na'ul achoti khala gal na'ul ma'eyan chatum
shelachayikh paredes rimovnim 'im peri megadim kefarim 'im-neradim
nered ׀ vekharekom qane veqinamovn 'im kal-'atsey levovna mor vaahalovt 'im kal-rashey vesamim
ma'eyan ganim beer mayim chayim venozelim min-levanovn
'uri tsafovn uvovi teyman hafichi gani yizelu vesamayv yavo dovdi leganov veyokhal peri megadayv
bati legani achoti khala ariti movri 'im-besami akhaleti ya'eri 'im-diveshi shatiti yeyni 'im-chalavi ikhelu re'im shetu veshikheru dovdim s
ani yeshena velibi 'er qovl ׀ dovdi dovfeq pitechi-li achoti ra'eyati yovnati tamati sheroshi nimela-tal qevutsovtay resisey layela
pashateti et-kutaneti eykhakha elebashena rachatseti et-ragelay eykhakha atanefem
dovdi shalach yadov min-hachor ume'ay hamu 'alayv
qameti ani lifetocha ledovdi veyaday natefu-movr veetsebe'otay movr 'over 'al kapovt hamane'ul
patacheti ani ledovdi vedovdi chamaq 'avar nafeshi yatsea vedaberov biqashetihu velo metsatihu qerativ velo 'anani
metsauni hashomerim hasovevim ba'ir hikuni fetsa'uni naseu et-redidi me'alay shomerey hachomovt
hisheba'eti etekhem benovt yerushalaim im-timetseu et-dovdi mah-tagidu lov shechovlat ahava ani
mah-dovdekh midovd hayafa banashim mah-dovdekh midovd shekakha hisheba'etanu
dovdi tsach veadovm dagul merevava
roshov ketem paz qeutsovtayv taletalim shechorovt ka'ovrev
'eynayv keyovnim 'al-afiqey mayim rochatsovt bechalav yoshevovt 'al-milet
lechayav ka'arugat habosem migedelovt mereqachim sifetovtayv shovshanim notefovt movr 'over
yadayv geliley zahav memulaim batareshish me'ayv 'eshet shen me'ulefet sapirim
shovqayv 'amudey shesh meyusadim 'al-adeney-faz mareehu kalevanovn bachur kaarazim
chikov mametaqim vekhulov machamadim ze dovdi veze re'i benovt yerushalaim
ana halakh dovdekh hayafa banashim ana pana dovdekh unevaqeshenu 'imakh
dovdi yarad leganov la'arugovt habosem lire'ovt baganim velileqot shovshanim
ani ledovdi vedovdi li haro'e bashovshanim s
yafa at ra'eyati ketiretsa nava kirushalaim ayuma kanidegalovt
hasebi 'eynayikh minegedi shehem hirehivuni sa'erekh ke'eder ha'izim shegaleshu min-hagile'ad
shinayikh ke'eder harechelim she'alu min-harachetsa shekulam mateimovt veshakula eyn bahem
kefelach harimovn raqatekh miba'ad letsamatekh
shishim hema melakhovt ushemonim pilageshim va'alamovt eyn misepar
achat hi yovnati tamati achat hi leimah bara hi leyovladetah rauha vanovt vayeasheruha melakhovt ufilageshim vayehaleluha s
mi-zot hanisheqafa kemov-shachar yafa khalevana bara kachama ayuma kanidegalovt s
el-ginat egovz yaradeti lireovt beibey hanachal lireovt hafarecha hagefen henetsu harimonim
lo yada'eti nafeshi samateni marekevovt 'ami-nadiv
shuvi shuvi hashulamit shuvi shuvi venechezeh-bakh mah-techezu bashulamit kimecholat hamachanayim
mah-yafu fe'amayikh bane'alim bat-nadiv chamuqey yerekhayikh kemov chalaim ma'ase yedey aman
sharerekh agan hasahar al-yechesar hamazeg bitenekh 'aremat chitim suga bashovshanim
sheney shadayikh kisheney 'ofarim taomey tseviya
tsavarekh kemigedal hashen 'eynayikh berekhovt becheshebovn 'al-sha'ar bat-rabim apekh kemigedal halevanovn tsovfe peney damaseq
roshekh 'alayikh kakaremel vedalat roshekh kaaregaman melekh asur barehatim
mah-yafit umah-na'amet ahava bata'anugim
zot qovmatekh dameta letamar veshadayikh leashekolovt
amareti e'ele vetamar ochaza besanesinayv veyiheyu-na shadayikh keeshekelovt hagefen vereycha apekh katapuchim
vechikekh keyeyn hatovv hovlekh ledovdi lemeysharim dovvev sifetey yeshenim
ani ledovdi ve'alay teshuqatov s
lekha dovdi netse hasade nalina bakefarim
nashekima lakeramim niree im parecha hagefen pitach hasemadar henetsu harimovnim sham eten et-doday lakh
hadudaim natenu-reycha ve'al-petacheynu kal-megadim chadashim gam-yeshanim dovdi tsafaneti lakh
mi yitenekha keach li yovneq shedey imi emetsaakha vachuts eshaqekha gam lo-yavuzu li
enehagakha aviakha el-beyt imi telamedeni asheqekha miyayin hareqach me'asis rimoni
semolov tachat roshi viminov techabeqeni
hisheba'eti etekhem benovt yerushalaim mah-ta'iru ׀ umah-te'oreru et-haahava 'ad shetechepats s
mi zot 'ola min-hamidebar miterapeqet 'al-dovdah tachat hatapucha 'ovraretikha ma chibelatekha imekha shama chibela yeladatekha
simeni khachovtam 'al-libekha kachovtam 'al-zerov'ekha ki-'aza khamavet ahava qasha khisheovl qinea reshafeyha rishepey esh shaleheveteya
mayim rabim lo yukhelu lekhabovt et-haahava uneharovt lo yishetefuha im-yiten ish et-kal-hovn beytov baahava bovz yavuzu lov s
achovt lanu qetana veshadayim eyn lah mah-na'ase laachotenu bayovm sheyedubar-bah
im-chovma hi nivene 'aleyha tirat kasef veim-delet hi natsur 'aleyha lucha arez
ani chovma veshaday kamigedalovt az hayiti ve'eynayv kemovtseet shalovm f
kerem haya lishelomo beva'al hamovn natan et-hakerem lanoterim ish yavi befireyov elef kasef
karemi sheli lefanay haelef lekha shelomo umatayim lenoterim et-pireyov
hayovshevet baganim chaverim maqeshivim leqovlekh hashemi'ini
berach ׀ dovdi udemeh-lekha litsevi ov le'ofer haayalim 'al harey vesamim
